mechanistic_hypotheses.hypothesis: PPARG modulates pathway response under varying exposure burden.
mechanistic_hypotheses.supporting_evidence: Curated integration of association, pathway, and epidemiologic evidence supports this relationship.

molecular_function: Pathway-level interaction under variable exposure conditions
name: Peroxisome Proliferator Activated Receptor Gamma

regulatory_notes.enhancer_associations: PPARG has enhancer associations in inflammatory and disease-linked contexts.
regulatory_notes.methylation_sensitivity: PPARG expression may shift with methylation dynamics and exposure burden.
regulatory_notes.promoter_activity: PPARG promoter activity is context-sensitive across curated tissue settings.

summary: PPARG is modeled as a disease-relevant locus that links inherited architecture, pathway activity, and environmental sensitivity in GENARCH educational outputs.
